email_campaigns.rule: 🔴 CRITICAL: After ANY campaign send (API or manual), verify within 15 minutes via live API call that status='sent' AND sent>0. Never trust HTTP status codes alone.
email_campaigns.reason: Brevo API campaigns 1-10 all returned 204 No Content but sent ZERO emails over 7 days. Silent failure discovered only when Lothar checked UI manually.

email_campaigns.rule: 🔴 Email campaign pre-flight checklist MANDATORY: (1) Domain SPF/DKIM verified, (2) Plan supports volume, (3) Test send to self, (4) Quota check.
email_campaigns.reason: Missing domain verification + free plan limits caused all API campaigns to fail at send time with no useful error message.

email_campaigns.rule: Never write delivery stats to operations.json unless verified via API query. If inferring from plans or logs, mark clearly as 'planned' not 'actual'.
email_campaigns.reason: operations.json contained '298 sent, 49 bounces' but API logs showed 0 sends. Created false confidence in system state.

email_campaigns.rule: Before reporting campaign success/failure to Lothar, query live API status. Never rely on session memory or prior tool outputs.
email_campaigns.reason: Reported campaign stats that didn't match reality, mixing planned batches with actual sends.

email_campaigns.rule: Brevo Free Plan: 300 emails/day limit, API campaigns >300 contacts require paid plan + domain verification.
email_campaigns.reason: Free plan blocked all API campaigns silently. Manual UI sends work up to daily quota.

whatsapp.rule: Nie in fremden WhatsApp-Chats antworten — immer Draft an Lothar
whatsapp.reason: Antworten erscheinen als grüne Nachrichten VON Lothar. Mehrfach passiert (Tramm, Badge, von Taube)

operations.rule: Mehrtägige Operationen sofort in operations.json loggen, nicht erst am Session-Ende
operations.reason: Session kann jederzeit enden, Kontext geht verloren

operations.rule: API-Status immer live prüfen — nie aus Memory-Files ableiten
operations.reason: Memory kann veraltet sein, führt zu falschen Annahmen

operations.rule: When state files (operations.json, lessons.json) contain data that contradicts API reality, ALWAYS query API first, then update files.
operations.reason: operations.json had phantom campaign data (298 sends) that never happened. Files are NOT source of truth — live systems are.

operations.rule: 🔴 CRITICAL: For auth/config/status checks (domain verification, plan limits, feature availability), ALWAYS cross-check API response against UI screenshot. If they conflict, TRUST THE UI.
operations.reason: Brevo API /v3/senders/domains/nylongerie.com returned {verified: true, authenticated: true} but UI showed 'Not authenticated' with Authenticate button. API had stale/cached data. Falsely reported domain as verified, wasted troubleshooting time.
operations.protocol: 1. Query API, 2. Request UI screenshot, 3. Compare, 4. If conflict → trust UI + document discrepancy

email_campaign: 🔴 Domain SPF/DKIM verified? (Check BOTH: API query + UI screenshot of domain status)
🔴 Plan supports send volume? (Free=300/day, API campaigns need paid plan)
🔴 Daily quota remaining? (Check via API before attempting send)
Shopify consent states live geprüft (nur subscribed)?
Blacklisted-in-List Count prüfen (Bounces von früheren Kampagnen)
🔴 After sendNow: Set 15-min verification timer, check status='sent' and sent>0. Alert if suspended.

task_chaining.trigger: Published 4 IG posts but never confirmed or continued to Stories
task_chaining.rule: Before ending ANY turn with async work: (1) verify all results are in, (2) confirm to Lothar, (3) chain into next step. If a poll returns success, the turn is NOT done — the follow-up is.
